name: gold_mean_reversion
description: Fade unusually extended gold moves when price is stretched relative to volatility and average behavior.
entry_rules: Require extreme extension, such as a large one-day move or strong deviation from Bollinger mean
Use RSI and ATR to confirm that price is stretched beyond normal volatility
Enter only when momentum shows signs of exhaustion
exit_rules: Use tight stop-losses and smaller size than trend strategies
Take profits quickly toward the mean or nearest equilibrium zone
Do not keep averaging into a move that keeps accelerating
research_notes: This is a good candidate for adding a no-trade filter when extension is not truly extreme.
Because it is counter-trend, it should probably use smaller position sizing than baseline strategies.
